description_long: This is a modern, open-frame shelving unit featuring three transparent shelves supported by a minimalistic black metal structure. The frame is composed of slender, rectangular metal tubing that forms a stable base and vertical supports, with the shelves appearing to be made of clear or frosted glass. The design is sleek and functional, with no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, making it ideal for displaying items or storing objects in an accessible manner. The open sides and back allow for easy access from multiple angles, while the glass shelves provide a light, airy appearance. The overall aesthetic is contemporary and would fit well in urban environments such as lofts, offices, or retail spaces. The construction suggests durability and a focus on both utility and visual appeal.
description: A modern, open-frame shelving unit with three transparent glass shelves and a black metal structure. Its minimalist design is both functional and visually light.
description_view_0: Front view showing three evenly spaced transparent shelves supported by a black metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the metal frame and the depth of the glass shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with clear visibility of the shelf arrangement and open structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim frame and shelf depth.
